notes: MediaBox 220x220, TrimBox 200x200 inset 10pt on all sides -> unset BleedBox falls back to CropBox -> MediaBox, giving 10pt margin (>= amount_pt 9).
Only MediaBox (200x200) is set; TrimBox/BleedBox/CropBox all fall back to it, so bleed==trim==media -> zero bleed margin -> bleed check fails.
DeviceRGB image (disallowed) at ~310 DPI on a page with adequate bleed and no fonts, so only color-mode fires. Pending until color-mode lands (MIC-134).
DeviceCMYK image (allowed) at ~310 DPI, adequate bleed, no fonts -> clean pass. Pending until color-mode lands (MIC-134).

100x100 px DeviceGray image placed at 4x4 in -> ~25 DPI, below min_dpi 300. image-resolution is severity warning in frisket-default, so it appears in warnings[] and report.pass stays true. Pending until image-resolution lands (MIC-134).
1240x1240 px DeviceGray image placed at 4x4 in -> ~310 DPI (>= 300), adequate bleed, no fonts -> clean pass. Pending until image-resolution lands (MIC-134).
Text set in Helvetica (standard-14) with no FontFile, adequate bleed, no images -> only embedded-fonts fires. Pending until embedded-fonts lands (MIC-134).
Text set in a subsetted TrueType font embedded via /FontFile2, adequate bleed, no images -> clean pass. Pending until embedded-fonts lands (MIC-134).

MediaBox == TrimBox == 540x720, 72 pt off the profile's expected 612x792 (US Letter) on each dimension, far beyond the 1 pt tolerance -> trim and page-size both fail (error severity in the test profile). Pending until trim/page-size land (MIC-134).
MediaBox == TrimBox == 612x792, matching the profile's expected US Letter size within tolerance -> clean pass. Pending until trim/page-size land (MIC-134).
